query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hofmarkt_bestellungen (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  hof_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  kunde_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  kunde_telefon VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  kunde_email VARCHAR(255),
  kunde_strasse VARCHAR(255),
  kunde_plz VARCHAR(10),
  kunde_ort VARCHAR(100),
  produkte JSON NOT NULL,
  gesamtpreis DECIMAL(10,2),
  nachricht TEXT,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'neu',
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_hof_user_id (hof_user_id),
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_kunde_telefon (kunde_telefon)
);

  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_hof_user_id (hof_user_id),
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_kunde_telefon (kunde_telefon)
);
